name: gateway
description: Multi-provider payment-gateway abstraction. Every tenant configures their own provider (Stripe / Paddle / Checkout.com / Square / Razorpay / Custom) with encrypted credentials, and every finance action resolves the tenant's active gateway through PaymentGatewayInterface. Uses Laravel Cashier where possible (Stripe + Paddle) plus custom adapters for the rest. Handles Stripe Connect (charge splits: tenant Connect account receives charge minus platform fee; Academorix platform account receives the fee) plus direct-mode (tenant's own account, no Connect). Every provider webhook lands via gateway_webhook_events with idempotency + retry. Ships three tables: payment_gateway_configs (per-tenant encrypted credentials + provider + mode + connect_account_id + webhook_secret_encrypted + supported_currencies_json), payment_methods (tokenized cards on file at owner_type = guardian OR tenant, provider_token + card_brand + card_last4 + is_default), gateway_webhook_events (per-tenant per-provider webhook ledger — provider_event_id unique, payload_json, processed_at, processing_error, retry_count). Consent-gated (payment-method vault). Adapter registry via #[Bind]. See DL-4 + DL-5 in tasks.md for the multi-gateway + Stripe Connect decisions.

wraps.rationale: Cashier handles Stripe + Paddle idiomatically (card vaulting, SCA, webhooks, subscriptions). Custom adapters extend the same PaymentGatewayInterface for Checkout.com / Square / Razorpay + a Custom Webhook provider. Guzzle powers non-cashier providers with retry-safe + connection-pooled HTTP.

tenant.description: Tenant-facing gateway configuration + webhook ledger. Owner + admin configure providers + rotate credentials; support role reads the webhook ledger.
